title: Hermes Agent + Mixture of Agents is insane…
summary: David Ondrej presents a video demonstration combining Hermes Agent with Mixture of Agents approach. The title uses enthusiastic language to convey a positive assessment of the combined system's capabilities.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates pairing the Hermes Agent with a Mixture of Agents approach, showing how the two combine in practice. The video sits at the intersection of AI agents and multi-agent systems, illustrating what results when an agent framework is layered with a mixture-of-agents method. The presentation frames the combined setup as a notable improvement in capability.
